scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev -w packages/server" "npm run dev -w packages/client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/client && npm run build -w packages/server
scripts.docker:build: source .env && docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --build-arg VITE_DISCORD_CLIENT_ID=$DISCORD_CLIENT_ID -t plex-discord-theater:latest --load .
scripts.docker:push: source .env && docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64 --build-arg VITE_DISCORD_CLIENT_ID=$DISCORD_CLIENT_ID -t zubywastaken/plex-discord-theater:latest --push .
